title: tapeinostemon rugosus
intro: Tapeinostemon rugosus, also known as the rough-skinned Tapeinostemon or the tapeinostemon plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine in the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tapeinostemon rugosus include its potential to help manage fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing its medicinal compounds to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
